task_objective: Clean up repository discrepancies identified during AGENTS.md protocol review.
design_decisions: Removed the Gemini-specific ignore file instead of replacing it, because AGENTS.md identifies AGENTS.md as the only generated agent instruction file.
Removed generated Python bytecode caches from the repository tree and relied on the existing wrapper PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX to keep future bytecode under /tmp/game-install-finder.
Added protocol regression tests so the same discrepancies fail in normal pytest runs.
results: Red pytest run failed on the tracked .geminiignore file and in-repository Python cache artifacts.
After cleanup, ./run.sh uv run ruff check . --fix passed.
After cleanup, ./run.sh uv run ruff format . passed.
After cleanup, ./run.sh uv run ty check src/ passed.
After cleanup, ./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 8 tests.
